2604.00043.title: DriftScript: A Domain-Specific Language for Programming Non-Axiomatic Reasoning Agents
2604.00043.paper_summary: Non-Axiomatic Reasoning Systems (NARS) provide a framework for building adaptive agents that operate under insufficient knowledge and resources. However, the standard input language, Narsese, poses a usability barrier: its dense symbolic notation, overloaded punctuation, and implicit conventions make programs difficult to read, write, and maintain. We present DriftScript, a Lisp-like domain-specific language that compiles to Narsese. DriftScript provides source-level constructs covering the major sentence and term forms used in Non-Axiomatic Logic (NAL) levels 1 through 8, including inheritance, temporal implication, variable quantification, sequential conjunction, and operation invocation, while replacing symbolic syntax with readable keyword-based S-expressions. The compiler is a zero-dependency, four-stage pipeline implemented in 1,941 lines of C99. When used with the DriftNARS engine, DriftScript programs connect to external systems through four structured callback types and an HTTP operation registry, enabling a sense-reason-act loop for autonomous agents. We describe the language design and formal grammar, detail the compiler architecture, and evaluate the compiler through a 106-case test suite, equivalence testing against hand-written Narsese, a NAL coverage analysis, structural readability metrics, and compilation benchmarks. The source code is available at https://github.com/seamus-brady/DriftNARS. This paper focuses on the design and implementation of the DriftScript language and its embedding into DriftNARS, rather than on new inference algorithms for NARS itself.
2604.00043.paper_summary_zh: 非公理推理系統（NARS）提供了一個框架，用於構建在知識和資源不足的情況下運作的自適應代理。然而，標準輸入語言 Narsese 造成了可用性障礙：其密集的符號表示法、過度的標點符號和隱含的約定使得程序難以閱讀、編寫和維護。我們提出了 DriftScript，一種類似 Lisp 的特定領域語言，能編譯成 Narsese。DriftScript 提供了涵蓋非公理邏輯（NAL）第 1 到第 8 級所使用的主要句子和術語形式的源級構造，包括繼承、時間含義、變量量化、序列聯接和操作調用，同時用可讀的基於關鍵字的 S 表達式替換了符號語法。編譯器是一個零依賴的四階段管道，實現於 1,941 行 C99 代碼中。當與 DriftNARS 引擎一起使用時，DriftScript 程序通過四種結構化的回調類型和一個 HTTP 操作註冊表連接到外部系統，實現自主代理的感知-推理-行動循環。我們描述了語言設計和形式語法，詳細介紹了編譯器架構，並通過 106 個案例測試套件、與手寫 Narsese 的等價性測試、NAL 覆蓋分析、結構可讀性指標和編譯基準來評估編譯器。源代碼可在 https://github.com/seamus-brady/DriftNARS 獲得。本文重點在於 DriftScript 語言的設計和實現及其嵌入到 DriftNARS 中，而不是針對 NARS 本身的新推理算法。
2604.00043.author: Seamus Brady et.al.
